description: Utilised Java programming, JUnit, Mockito, Object-oriented Programming & cooperation across 4 teams to implement a new data provider for AWS Database Migration Service’s customers worldwide. Improved the time to release new data providers by 60% by creating an automation tool connecting AWS VPC, Lambda, SQS, Event Bridge, ML model from Amazon Bedrock, internal versioning & ticketing systems APIs to allow for custom code generation compliant with company’s standards and clean code principles.
